name: GD AI Solver Extreme
description: AI bot that completes Geometry Dash levels with human-like behaviour. Analysing real hitboxes, frame-perfect precision and zero crashes on mobile.

ai-enabled.name: AI Enabled
ai-enabled.description: Master switch — enable/disable the AI solver.

human-variance-ms.name: Human Timing Variance (ms)
human-variance-ms.description: Max random delay added to non-critical jumps to mimic human reaction.

frame-perfect-threshold.name: Frame-Perfect Threshold (px)
frame-perfect-threshold.description: Distance at which the AI switches to zero-variance, frame-perfect mode.

lookahead-distance.name: Look-ahead Distance (px)
lookahead-distance.description: How many pixels ahead the AI scans for hazards.

show-debug-hitboxes.name: Show Debug Hitboxes
show-debug-hitboxes.description: Draw AI hitbox overlay (dev/debug only — impacts performance).
